rationale: No direct new escalation affecting Poland — ongoing war background unchanged, El Niño and distant conflicts have minimal direct impact on a Polish resident's daily life.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active, raising risk of extreme weather globally including in Europe — potential impact on energy prices and agriculture.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-North Korea alignment could indirectly affect NATO's eastern flank calculus and Poland's security environment.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military action in Lebanon; no direct Poland impact but contributes to broader Middle East instability affecting EU energy markets.
